settings.info: Affects buttons, cards, and media.

settings.info: https://youtube.com/@yourhandle

settings.label: Color
settings.info: Hex (e.g. #ea580c) or CSS gradient string.
Hex / gradient / @palette-token reference. Leave empty to default to transparent.

settings.label: Font Family
settings.info: CSS font-family value used for --font-heading, --font-body, --font-button, --font-accent. E.g. 'Inter', 'Playfair Display', sans-serif.

settings.label: Google Fonts URL
settings.info: Full stylesheet URL from Google Fonts (e.g. https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter…). Leave blank for system fonts.

schema.name: Type Styles
schema.info: Type styles bundle font family, size, weight, tracking, leading, and transform into one named treatment. Text-rendering blocks reference a single `type_style: <id>` instead of setting all dimensions individually. Single-dimension `font_size` (flat rem) — mobile responsiveness handled by CSS-side media queries on the rendered .ts-<id> class.

settings.label: Font
settings.info: Picks one of the named font schemes (heading / body / button / brand-extended).

settings.label: Font Size
settings.info: Flat font-size value (e.g. `3rem`). Single-dimension only — mobile shrink applied via CSS media queries on .ts-<id>, not per-style data.

settings.label: Max Width
settings.info: Any CSS max-width value: rem (e.g. 56rem), %, or "none" for unbounded.

schema.name: Height Scale
schema.info: Height tiers — single `value` (any CSS length: rem, %, vh, etc.). Each tier renders to .height-<id>. The `floor` flag controls whether the tier sets `height` (fixed) or `min-height` (block can grow past it). Structural tiers (`auto`, `full`, `custom`) have specialized CSS in theme.css and skip the dynamic loop.

settings.label: Value
settings.info: Any CSS length: rem (e.g. `16rem`), %, vh (e.g. `100vh`), or `auto`.

settings.label: Behaves as a floor (min-height)
settings.info: When on, blocks using this tier render with `min-height` — block can grow past the tier value if its content is taller. When off (default), the tier sets a fixed `height`. Source HTML's `min-h-N` maps to floor tiers; `h-N` maps to fixed tiers.

schema.name: Space Scale
schema.info: Spacing tiers — single `value` (any CSS length: rem, em, etc.). Each tier renders to --space-<id> for padding/margin/gap classes. Built-ins (none/xs/sm/md/lg/xl/2xl/3xl/custom) live in defaults; transpiler synthesizes additional tiers from source HTML spacing values. Structural tiers (`none` zero-out, `custom` per-instance values via --space-pl/pr/pt/pb/mt/mb/ml/mr/gap) have specialized CSS rules in theme.css; the dynamic loop in theme_variables.liquid skips them.

settings.label: Value
settings.info: Any CSS length: rem (e.g. `1rem`, `1.5rem`), em, or px.

settings.label: Gradient
settings.info: Any CSS gradient (linear-gradient, radial-gradient, conic-gradient).

settings.label: Alignment
settings.info: Desktop only.

settings.label: Desktop nav breakpoint
settings.info: Width threshold above which the desktop nav shows and the hamburger is hidden.

settings.label: Show Navigation
settings.info: Renders the desktop nav (and the drawer's nav links). Disable for minimal headers — e.g. checkout, order confirmation.

settings.label: Show Action Blocks
settings.info: Renders the user-arranged action blocks (buttons, groups). Cart and search icons have their own toggles.

settings.label: Show Mobile Drawer
settings.info: Renders the hamburger button and drawer below the desktop breakpoint. Disable for headers that don't need a mobile menu (e.g. checkout).

settings.label: Text Color Role
settings.info: Header text color. Child blocks inherit this unless overridden.

settings.label: Backdrop Blur
settings.info: Frosted-glass blur strength behind the header.
Tokens for the slide-out menu shown below the desktop breakpoint.

settings.label: Drawer Color Scheme
settings.info: Defaults to the same surface as the header section. Set explicitly to use a different scheme for the slide-out menu.

settings.label: Show Placeholder
settings.info: Show a pattern when no image is selected.

settings.label: Text
settings.default: Reserve Now, Open Daily, Fresh Ingredients
settings.info: Comma separated

settings.label: Category Name
settings.info: Select category to display.

settings.label: Navigation Layout
settings.info: Horizontal layout works best for menus with many top-level categories.

settings.label: Sticky Top Offset (Horizontal Nav Layout)
settings.info: Adjust this to clear your site header if the menu is being covered.

settings.label: Content Width
settings.info: Caps the content area. Centered (mx-auto) when capped below the section's bg width.

settings.label: Background Width
settings.info: Where the section background extends. `Fill` = full-bleed; narrower tiers cap the bg layer too.

settings.label: Override surface
settings.info: When enabled, this section introduces its own surface scope. Otherwise descendants inherit the surface from the parent (page default unless a surrounding section overrode it).

settings.content: Founded in 2025, we believe in honest ingredients and good vibes.

settings.label: Slide Width (Desktop)
settings.info: Set to < 100% to show part of the next slide.

settings.label: Arrow Style
settings.info: Controls are middle sides.

settings.label: Color Scheme
settings.info: Controls the color of arrows and dots.

settings.label: Text
settings.default: Exclusive events and seasonal menu updates.

settings.label: Text Color Role
settings.info: Defaults to inheriting the header section's text role.

settings.label: Text Color Role
settings.info: Defaults to inheriting the header section's text role.

settings.label: Pin to Bottom
settings.info: Fixes the marquee to the bottom of the section.

settings.label: Background
settings.info: Defaults to Surface when pinned to bottom, Body otherwise.

settings.label: Backdrop Blur
settings.info: Frosted-glass blur strength behind the card.

settings.label: Show Placeholder
settings.info: Show a pattern when no image is selected.

settings.label: Text Color
settings.info: Text color when this tab is active. Inherited by child text/icon blocks via --text.

settings.label: Text Palette Token
settings.info: Picks a named brand-palette token.

settings.label: Text Color
settings.info: Text color when this tab is inactive. Inherited by child text/icon blocks via --text.

settings.label: Backdrop Blur
settings.info: Frosted-glass blur strength behind the badge.

settings.label: Mobile Peek (%)
settings.info: Percentage of the next card to reveal. Set to 0 for exact fit.

settings.label: Desktop Peek (%)
settings.info: Percentage of the next card to reveal. Set to 0 for exact fit.

settings.label: Horizontal Nudge
settings.info: Fine-tune the horizontal position (negative moves left, positive moves right).

settings.label: Vertical Nudge
settings.info: Fine-tune the vertical position to align with headings outside the block (negative moves up).

settings.label: Direction breakpoint
settings.info: This controls the viewport width at which the layout switches from column to row.

settings.label: Backdrop Blur
settings.info: Frosted-glass blur strength applied behind the block.

settings.label: SVG
settings.default: <svg fill="currentColor" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M10 18a8 8 0 100-16 8 8 0 000 16zm3.707-9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414-1.414L9 10.586 7.707 9.293a1 1 0 00-1.414 1.414l2 2a1 1 0 001.414 0l4-4z" clip-rule="evenodd"/></svg>

settings.label: Bottom Offset
settings.info: Lift up to clear marquees.
